name: Superpowers
summary: Bring the Superpowers development workflow into NextClaw with bundled references for brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, review, and verification.

summaryI18n.en: Bring the Superpowers development workflow into NextClaw with bundled references for brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, review, and verification.
summaryI18n.zh: 把 Superpowers 开发工作流接入 NextClaw，内置 brainstorming、规划、TDD、调试、review 与验收验证等本地参考能力。

description: Use this skill when the user wants a disciplined engineering workflow inside NextClaw. It adapts the upstream obra/superpowers project into a marketplace-ready package with a single workflow router and bundled local references for design-first planning, implementation plans, test-driven development, systematic debugging, code review, and verification-before-completion.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants a disciplined engineering workflow inside NextClaw. It adapts the upstream obra/superpowers project into a marketplace-ready package with a single workflow router and bundled local references for design-first planning, implementation plans, test-driven development, systematic debugging, code review, and verification-before-completion.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望在 NextClaw 中采用更有纪律的工程工作流时使用此技能。它把上游 obra/superpowers 项目适配成可上架的 marketplace 包：通过一个总入口 skill，加上本地打包的设计先行、实现规划、测试驱动开发、系统化调试、代码审查与完成前验证等参考文档，形成可安装的流程方法论。

author: NextClaw (adapted from Jesse Vincent / obra)
